response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, C programming for UNIX is not a primary skill (only briefly at National Instruments a decade ago), and there is no demonstrated experience with LAN-switch firmware, Linux kernel modification, MACsec/802.1X, or networking protocols like NETCONF/SNMP. The profile is mismatched with embedded networking security requirements.
strengths: Broad software engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and Linux familiarity
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD) and self-driven open-source contributions
concerns: No indication of Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
Lacks Linux kernel source modification and embedded firmware experience
No demonstrated security/networking expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, NETCONF, SNMP)

key_factors.factor: No embedded Linux kernel / LAN-switch firmware experience
